courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: Planetary Gravity Game
genericDescription: Implement force, mass, velocity, acceleration, and distance-based attraction; stabilize simulation for playability.
specificDescription: Build a spaceship, orbit, slingshot, or gravity-puzzle game where celestial bodies attract or repel the player. Include at least three bodies with different masses and a trajectory preview or training mode.
gradingRubric: 30 pts physics model; 20 pts simulation stability; 20 pts player-facing readability; 15 pts trajectory/help tools; 15 pts reflection.
